title: REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH - 211info
text: DOWNTOWN HEALTH CENTER REDMOND REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF The Oregon Reproductive Health (RH) Program oversees a statewide network of certified health care providers to ensure access to a suite of reproductive health services (including preventive reproductive health care, preconception and contraception). Services include annual gynecological exams (including pap tests, breast exams and STI screening); pregnancy testing; birth control counseling, contraception, emergency contraception, abortion referrals; and more. 236 NW Kingwood Avenue Redmond, OR 97756 Eligibility: Individuals with a household income below 250% FPL Services are provided to all individuals regardless of ability to pay, race, color, national origin, immigration status, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, age, or disability. Hours: Monday/Tuesday/Thursday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm Email (541) 617-4775 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 617-4775 Reproductive Health Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: None for individuals with a household income under 250% FPL. Sliding scale fees available for individuals with a household income above 250% FPL. Insurance will be billed, if applicable. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Deschutes County SITE HOURS: Monday/Tuesday/Thursday 8am-5pm Services: Abortion Referrals Birth Control Counseling Breast Examinations Contraception Emergency Contraception General Sexuality/Reproductive Health Education Pap Tests Pregnancy Testing Sexually Transmitted Infection Screening Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - HARM REDUCTION PROGRAM HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - OREGON MOTHERSCARE AND PERINATAL CARE COORDINATION PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - WOMEN, INFANTS, AND CHILDREN SUPPLEMENTAL NUTRITION PROGRAM SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - VACCINES AND IMMUNIZATION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. DOWNTOWN HEALTH CENTER REDMOND
